subcodes.first_line: O thou Mím, hearken unto My voice and be not of them that tarry. Testify in thyself that there is none other god but Him, the Almighty, the All-Powerful
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا حرف المیم اسمع ندائی و لا تکن من الصابرین ثم اشهد فی نفسک بانه هو الله لا اله
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @love of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
